title: prostanthera cruciflora
intro: Prostanthera cruciflora, commonly known as the 'Flax Lily', is a flowering plant native to eastern Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Prostanthera cruciflora include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Prostanthera cruciflora can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its essential oil has also been extracted for various applications.
